# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: vpc-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true

- name: subnet-private
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    ipCidrRange: "10.0.0.0/24"
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)

- name: subnet-public
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    ipCidrRange: "10.0.1.0/24"
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    purpose: INTERNAL_HTTPS_LOAD_BALANCER

- name: subnet-mgmt
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    ipCidrRange: "10.0.2.0/24"
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)

- name: firewall-rule-private
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-private
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "22"
          - "8080"
      - IPProtocol: icmp
    sourceRanges:
      - "10.0.0.0/24"

- name: firewall-rule-public
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-public
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "80"
          - "443"
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"

- name: firewall-rule-mgmt
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-management
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "22"
          - "3389"
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"

- name: firewall-rule-internal-http
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-internal-http
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "80"
    sourceRanges:
      - "10.0.2.0/24"

- name: firewall-rule-internal-https
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-internal-https
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "443"
    sourceRanges:
      - "10.0.2.0/24"

- name: firewall-rule-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-ssh
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "22"
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"

- name: firewall-rule-icmp
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: allow-icmp
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: icmp
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
